data.title: The floating profit of a whale who shorted BTC 20 times on Hyperliquid has expanded to $8.392 million again
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, the floating profit of a whale that shorted BTC 20 times on Hyperliquid has expanded again to 8.392 million US dollars, which is not far from the psychological profit-taking price of 70475-74192 US dollars. Another drop of 7%-10% will allow him to exit the market with a profit.

data.title: Tech Sector Experiences Significant Market Value Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. stock market's technology sector has experienced a substantial decline, with the market value of the 'seven giants' decreasing by over $3 trillion from recent highs. Strategy's stock fell by 14%, Tesla by 8%, and Palantir by 7%. Alphabet and Broadcom both saw a 5% decrease, while Meta and Nvidia each dropped by 4%. Amazon and Netflix experienced a 3% decline, and Microsoft's stock decreased by 2%.

data.title: DeFi TVL has given back all gains since Trump was elected as US president
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Since Trump was elected President of the United States in November 2024, the total value of cryptocurrencies locked in DeFi protocols (TVL) has completely given up its previous gains. Analyst Miles Deutscher pointed out that since the US election, DeFi TVL soared to US$138 billion on December 17, but fell back to US$92.6 billion by March 10. DefiLlama data shows that Ethereum's TVL has fallen by US$45 billion from its cyclical highs. Despite positive developments in the industry, such as the launch of spot ETFs in the United States and Trump's signing of an executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve, Ethereum's all-time high of US$4,787 in November 2021 has not been broken so far. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: The U.S. tech sector fell across the board, and the market value of the "Big 7" shrunk by more than $3 trillion from its recent highs
CoinDesk 20 Index Experiences Significant Decline
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the CoinDesk 20 Index has experienced a notable downturn, with its current trading value at 2658.12. This marks a decrease of 7.2%, equivalent to a drop of 205.91 points since the last recorded value on Friday at 4 p.m. ET. Notably, none of the 20 assets within the index are trading in positive territory.

Among the assets, Ethereum (ETH) and Aave (AAVE) have shown relatively better performance, with ETH declining by 2.2% and AAVE by 3.0%. On the other hand, Chainlink (LINK) and NEAR Protocol (NEAR) have emerged as the most significant laggards, with LINK experiencing a sharp decline of 14.3% and NEAR dropping by 12.5%.

The CoinDesk 20 Index is a comprehensive index that is traded across multiple platforms and regions worldwide. It serves as a benchmark for the performance of the leading digital assets in the market, reflecting the broader trends and movements within the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 550 USDT with a 3.70% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 10, 2025, 14:18 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 550 USDT and is now trading at 548.51001 USDT, with a narrowed 3.70% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: MyShell: The team has no connection or association with Web3Port
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MyShell posted on the X platform: "Rumors about Web3Port are spreading. It needs to be clarified that the MyShell team has no connection or association with Web3Port, nor does it participate in any activities related to it. MyShell is committed to innovating and expanding the possibilities of AI and cryptocurrency."

data.title: Whale Increases Bitcoin Holdings With Significant Purchase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Lookonchain monitoring has revealed that a cryptocurrency whale recently acquired 200 Bitcoin at an average price of $82,750, amounting to a total value of $16.55 million. This transaction occurred two hours prior to the report. Following this purchase, the whale's total Bitcoin holdings have increased to 315 BTC, with a current value of $26.06 million.

data.title: MyShell Clarifies Rumors About Web3Port Association
data.description: According to Odaily, MyShell has addressed circulating rumors on the X platform, stating that there is no connection or involvement between the MyShell team and Web3Port. The company emphasized its commitment to innovation and the expansion of possibilities in AI and cryptocurrency.

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has exploded more than 60 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of 60.7598 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 57.9041 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 2.8557 million US dollars.
